
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Oma's Cilantro Bean Dip.
    Summary: Nathan,

Oma Dianne has some of the best recipes! When she decided to move from her home into assisted living she allowed me to have her recipe cards. I have not made all of them but I can almost guarantee they are the best. Just like you and your soon to be little brother. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 2 cups frozen corn, 15 oz black beans, drained and rinsed, 1  large fresh tomato, chopped, 0.75 cups red pepper, chopped, 0.5 cups red onion, chopped, 0.5 cups italian dressing, 0.25 cups fresh minced cilantro, 0.75 tsp hot pepper sauce, 0.5 tsp garlic powder or fresh garlic
    Tags: undefined
